titles: "월 50만 원씩 30년, 1.3억이 사라졌다" 당신의 펀드가 돈을 잃은 진짜 이유
같은 돈을 넣었는데 1.3억이 증발합니다 — 펀드 수수료의 충격적인 진실
펀드 vs ETF, 30년 후 1.3억 차이 나는 이유 — 수수료가 만든 잔인한 복리
thumbnail_texts: ETF vs 펀드 / 30년 뒤 이 차이
월가에 맞선 한 남자 / ETF의 시작

character_poses.1: INTRO-02 놀란 표정 — 1.3억 증발 충격 리액션
character_poses.2: INTRO-04 차트 가리키며 설명 — ETF/펀드 대조 프레젠터
character_poses.3: REACT-03 자신감 결론 — 월가 혁명 스토리

meta.design_rule: 상단 60% 스컹크+배경+오브젝트 / 하단 40% 순검정 (미리캔버스 노랑 2줄 텍스트 자리). 말풍선 라벨 자리는 이미지 상단 좌우 여백에 확보.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 1 — 스컹크 놀란 표정(INTRO-02). 좌측 40% 스컹크 반신 충격 리액션, 우측 60% 황금 코인/지폐 더미가 가루로 부서져 먼지로 흩날리는 드라마틱 장면. 하단 40% 순검정 (미리캔버스 텍스트 자리).
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes wide open in shock, small pink nose, mouth open with shocked surprised expression. Small exclamation marks floating around the head. Clean vector illustration style with thick outlines and soft shading. The skunk is positioned on the LEFT side of the frame, upper body shot, both paws raised in shock gesture. On the RIGHT side of the frame: a dramatic pile of gleaming golden coins and crisp banknotes gradually cracking, crumbling and disintegrating into fine golden dust particles floating in the air, with deep crimson cracks spreading across the coins. Background: navy blue to black gradient with subtle golden bokeh sparkles. Upper 60% of the frame contains all visual elements with clear empty margin in top corners for later label overlay. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Absolutely no text, no letters, no words, no numbers, no watermark anywhere in the image. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 2 — 스컹크 차트설명 포즈(INTRO-04). 중앙 스컹크가 양쪽 대조 차트를 가리킴. 왼쪽 빨간 하락(펀드), 오른쪽 초록 상승(ETF), 중앙 VS 구분선. 상단에 '20배' 라벨 자리 확보. 하단 40% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes, small pink nose, confident teacher expression. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk stands in the CENTER of the frame, full body shot, one paw pointing to the LEFT at a large downward-trending red stock chart labeled with dollar bag icon (representing high-fee mutual fund), other paw pointing to the RIGHT at a large upward-trending green stock chart labeled with a basket icon (representing low-fee ETF). A bold golden 'VS' divider separates the two sides. Left side has deep crimson red glow, right side has vibrant emerald green glow. Background: clean navy blue split with subtle financial grid pattern. Upper 60% contains all visual elements with clear empty margin in top-left corner for label overlay. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Absolutely no text, no letters, no words, no numbers, no percentages, no watermark in the image. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 3 — 스컹크 자신감 결론(REACT-03). 스컹크가 정장 차림으로 레트로 월가 배경 앞에 당당히 섰음. 뒤에 1976년 느낌 VANGUARD 간판 실루엣과 황금 상승 차트. 월가에 맞선 한 남자 스토리 비주얼. 하단 40% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes, small pink nose, confident determined expression with a slight smile. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk wears a tiny navy business suit with a red tie, standing CENTER-LEFT in the frame, full body shot, one paw raised with a confident thumbs-up gesture. Background: stylized retro 1970s Wall Street scene with classic brick buildings and vintage street lamps on the left side, an open sky on the upper right with a golden upward-surging stock chart rising like a comet. Small stylized icons of stock certificates and index fund symbols floating around the skunk. Warm amber and deep navy color palette with vintage film grain effect. The upper-right area of the sky is clean open space with only the rising chart comet, no buildings, no signs, no billboards, no rectangular shapes, no boxes in that area. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Absolutely no text, no letters, no words, no numbers, no signboards, no name plates, no rectangular banners anywhere in the image. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, cinematic retro aesthetic with high saturation.
